# Power + Gas Analytics Workbench

This repository contains a model-agnostic Power + Gas Trading Analytics system.

## Start here

- `AGENTS.md`: operating instructions for agents.
- `docs/BUILD_PACKET_v0.1.md`: full architecture and scope.
- `docs/CONVENTIONS_LOCKED_v0.1.md`: locked v0.1 market conventions.
- `domain/`: canonical market conventions.
- `registries/`: machine-readable approved product/index/location definitions.
- `schemas/`: JSON schemas for normalized objects.
- `analytics/`: deterministic calculation logic.
- `src/pga_workbench/`: starter Python implementation.
- `skills/`: reusable analytical procedures.
- `evals/` and `tests/`: invariants and executable tests.
- `development/`: controlled improvement process.

## Most important rules

Do not infer conventions. Do not reverse spreads. Do not value unknown products. Gas contract sizing is `.25/d` per contract. Fail closed with structured exceptions.
